Custom Development

Ship real
software.
Not templates.

We design and build custom web apps, mobile apps, and APIs from scratch. React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, PHP, native iOS & Android — we own the full stack.

Start a project →See our work

languages & frameworks in our core stack

What we build
01
Web apps & portals
B2B dashboards, client portals, admin panels. React + Next.js frontend, Node.js or Python backend, PostgreSQL.
ReactNext.jsNode.js
02
E-commerce & marketplaces
Custom e-commerce, booking platforms, marketplace logic. WooCommerce, headless, or fully custom.
PHPWooCommerceStripe
03
Mobile apps
Native iOS and Android. React Native for cross-platform, Swift/Kotlin when native performance matters.
iOS · AndroidReact Native
04
APIs & backend systems
RESTful APIs, GraphQL, microservices, webhooks. Python FastAPI, Node Express, PHP Laravel.
PythonPHP LaravelNode.js
05
AI-powered apps
Applications with AI baked in — GPT-4o, Claude, embeddings, RAG pipelines. Not wrappers — real products.
GPT-4oClaude APIRAG
06
Integrations & data pipelines
Connect any two systems. CRM → ERP, portal → accounting. Python or Node pipelines, built to last.
APIsPythonWebhooks

Recent builds
01

Brokerage Revenue Analyzer

Next.js + AI. Built in 3 weeks. 40+ Dubai brokerages using it. Zero backend maintenance.

Next.jsOpenAIVercel
02

SaaS Stack Auditor

AI-powered audit tool on Vercel serverless. Handles 100+ submissions/day with zero infra management.

Next.jsClaude APIServerless
03

Farm monitoring system (HayGuard)

React + Node.js + IoT. Real-time sensor data, automated alert system. Under 30 second alert delivery.

ReactNode.jsIoT
04

Invoice management system

Multi-currency (EUR/USD/AED/RON), recurring billing, analytics. Runs Tergo Media's own agency operations.

Next.jsPostgreSQLStripe
How we price

Fixed scope

You know what you want. We define it precisely, price it, and build it. No surprises, no scope creep. Most projects work this way.

Time & materials

Exploratory or fast-moving projects where scope evolves. Weekly billing, daily visibility on progress. You can stop anytime.

Retainer

Ongoing development and maintenance. Fixed monthly hours, priority response, no onboarding overhead on new requests.

Have a product idea?

Tell us what you want to build. We'll scope it, price it, and ship it.
